scope_statement: Fresh verifier check for only the scoped MVP-03.03 consent version logging sprint after the minimal fix for scoped-git-diff-check-generated-contracts-blank-line-eof. This verdict does not close full MVP-03, the MVP stage, parent aliases or any human gate.
summary: Fresh api-client check:generated, check:openapi-drift and typecheck commands exited 0.
Fresh marker scan confirms packages/api-client contains legal-acceptances, LegalDocumentAcceptance, LegalDocumentType, PRIVACY_POLICY, draft-2026-05-12 and LEGAL_DOCUMENT_CURRENT_DRAFT_VERSION.
OpenAPI snapshot and generated src/dist contracts include the legal acceptance endpoint/types/client helper and current draft version marker.
generate-contracts now returns trimEnd() + newline, and scoped/no-index whitespace verification passes for new/untracked scoped files including packages/api-client/src/generated/contracts.ts.
Previous backend Maven/root verifier evidence is accepted because exact fresh raw refs contain [exit_status] 0 and scoped backend consent/migration/test files are not newer than those refs.
apps/web remains non-mutating for this sprint; no fresh browser/screenshot evidence is required for the api-client/generated-contract EOF fix.
Human gates, full MVP-03 and the MVP stage remain open.

previous_gaps.evidence: packages/api-client now covers the legal acceptance endpoint, request/response/client helper, LegalDocumentType and PRIVACY_POLICY in snapshot/generator/generated src/dist artifacts; fresh generated/drift/typecheck proof passes.

packages/api-client carries draft-2026-05-12 and LEGAL_DOCUMENT_CURRENT_DRAFT_VERSION in the OpenAPI snapshot and generated src/dist contracts; check-openapi-drift compares the OpenAPI example with backend LegalAcceptanceService.CURRENT_DRAFT_VERSION.
packages/api-client/scripts/generate-contracts.mjs emits trimEnd() + newline; generated contracts tail has no blank line at EOF; fresh scoped git diff and no-index whitespace checks pass.

basis: Exact previous fresh verifier backend/root raw refs contain [exit_status] 0.
Scoped backend consent source, test and V007 migration files are not newer than those previous backend/root verifier raw refs.
packages/api-client/openapi/finrhythm-api.openapi.json has the legal acceptance path and LegalDocumentVersionRequest.documentVersion.example = draft-2026-05-12.
packages/api-client/scripts/check-openapi-drift.mjs reads backend LegalAcceptanceService.CURRENT_DRAFT_VERSION and compares it with that OpenAPI example.

ui_evidence.reason: The verified minimal fix is api-client/generated-contract EOF formatting only and did not introduce user-visible UI behavior. The sprint remains non-mutating on apps/web because there is no trustworthy employeeRegistrationId/session bridge.
